name: Maid on Duty
Description: Ancilla the maid of the forest dungeon is patrolling its halls, cleaning up any mess she finds.

theScene: As you walk through the twisting paths of the dungeon, a chill goes up your spine as you register a second set of foot steps behind you.
You turn around only to see... a mattress flying at you!
You twist, narrowly avoiding the cushiony attack out of sheer, confused panic. Gasping from exertion, you turn to see your assailant.
Ancilla's demeanor is calm and collected, and as she starts to wordlessly approach, you realize you won't be talking your way out of this fight!
With Ancilla defeated you're free to continue...
